issue_summary: Deleted deprecated classes in package "linear". Removed redundant methods in "Array2DRowRealMatrix". Removed usage of "MatrixIndexException" (class is now deprecated). Javadoc clean up.
javadoc_before: /** * Compute this minus m. * * @param m matrix to be subtracted * @return this + m * @throws IllegalArgumentException if m is not the same size as this */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Subtract {@code m} from this matrix.
     *
     * @param m Matrix to be subtracted.
     * @return {@code this} - m.
     * @throws org.apache.commons.math.exception.MatrixDimensionMismatchException
     * if {@code m} is not the same size as this matrix.
     */
